title: New electrolyte tech enables stable operation of high-voltage sodium-ion batteries

summary: New research from China reveals that ultraviolet degradation in TOPCon solar cells is governed by interface-level physical mechanisms involving hydrogen dynamics, defect formation, and charge evolution. These processes are strongly influenced by the design of the silicon nitride/aluminum oxide passivation stack, which determines long-term device stability.

title: Bandgap-engineered indoor perovskite solar cell achieves 37.44% efficiency
